payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Front-facing dark brown stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers, molded drawer fronts and metal bail/drop handles; polished finish with visible wood grain, mostly fully visible in the crop and approximately 0.9 m from the camera.
